info.shortName: ProShares K-1 Free Crude Oil ET
info.longName: ProShares K-1 Free Crude Oil ETF

funds_data.description: The fund invests in financial instruments that ProShare Advisors believes, in combination, should track the performance of the index. The index is designed to measure the performance of three separate contract schedules for West Texas Intermediate (“WTI”) Crude Oil futures.
